task_completion.description: Configure Tor Browser to retain browsing history.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Tor Browser's Settings (Privacy & Security section) with history settings changed from 'Always use private browsing mode' to 'Remember history' or 'Use custom settings for history' with history retention enabled.

task_completion.description: Create a local HTML dashboard at /home/ga/Documents/osint_dashboard.html with a heading and specific links.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'osint_dashboard.html' in the Documents folder, containing an HTML heading (e.g., <h1>) and hyperlinks to 'https://check.torproject.org/' and 'https://metrics.torproject.org/'.

task_completion.description: Create an executable desktop launcher named 'OSINT Dashboard' that launches Tor Browser with the dashboard URI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the creation of 'OSINT-Dashboard.desktop' in /home/ga/Desktop/ with 'Name=OSINT Dashboard' and an 'Exec=' line pointing to the Tor Browser executable and 'file:///home/ga/Documents/osint_dashboard.html'. Alternatively, the 'OSINT Dashboard' icon visible on the desktop.

task_completion.description: Launch the dashboard via the desktop shortcut.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser open and displaying the local HTML dashboard, with 'file:///home/ga/Documents/osint_dashboard.html' visible in the URL address bar.

task_completion.description: Visit the Tor check link from the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser actively displaying the 'https://check.torproject.org/' webpage, indicating the link from the dashboard was clicked or navigated to.

task_completion.description: Verify the activity is recorded in the browser history.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tor Browser History window, sidebar, or Library view open, clearly showing an entry for 'check.torproject.org' or 'Congratulations. This browser is configured to use Tor'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used Tor Browser and not a standard Firefox or Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window should have Tor Browser branding (e.g., the onion logo, Tor circuit display in the URL bar, or Tor Browser in the title bar).

integrity.description: Ensure the dashboard was launched via the desktop shortcut as requested, rather than just opening the file manually from the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing interaction with the Desktop environment (e.g., double-clicking the OSINT Dashboard icon or right-clicking to 'Allow Launching') before the browser opens.

integrity.description: Ensure the history verification was done using the browser's actual UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The history verification must be shown within the Tor Browser's graphical interface (Ctrl+H, Library, or menu), not just by querying SQLite databases in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected HTML path: /home/ga/Documents/osint_dashboard.html. Expected desktop shortcut path: /home/ga/Desktop/OSINT-Dashboard.desktop. Desktop shortcut name: 'OSINT Dashboard'. Target history URL to verify: check.torproject.org.
